name: nexus-analytics
description: Nexus Analytics (thin) — a domain extension for the `nexus` core pipeline. Ships the data-analyst persona (batched-interview intake, model-first navigation, answer-contract discipline) plus its three method skills: semantic-model-query (the resolution ladder — grain, metric, dimension — with mandatory pre-query obligations), data-investigation (delegates unknown-column/flag meaning to the mine-semantic-model skill), and answer-qa (the shipped-answer contract). All model access is mediated by the consuming project's docs/semantic-model/profile.md — representation-agnostic (JSON bundle or CSV trio). Requires nexus core installed — install ALONGSIDE nexus, not instead of it.
